text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Come to think of it, it was just last fall...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
When the unbeatable condor was brought down
at Tokyo Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
By none other than the strongest Umamusume in
all the country—the Non-stop Runaway, Silence
Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But these broken wings have been healed by the
love of my friends, my teachers, and my
unwavering spirit!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My comeback will happen right here, at the
Takarazuka Kinen! And after that, I'll take my
rightful place at the throne!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Suuuzukaaa! Let's have a good race today!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've done everything I can do! I've done
everything I can't do! I've done it all to prepare
for this day!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even at the Fan Fest, you were something else... I
don't think there's a single area where I'm better
than you...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But I'm still gonna take you down! If I don't win,
there's no way I'll make it on an international
level!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Here in front of this massive audience, I swear on
the sky I'll win today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa's challenge sends the crowd into a
frenzy even greater than at the Mainichi Okan.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'll see you out there! Chao!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're wrong, El...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm not as great as you think I am...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You have a strength unfamiliar to me. A strength I
don't have.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
When you hear the voices around you... you
change.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You kept getting back up at the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Every cheer gave you new strength.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And it wasn't just your fans either. Your friends
have made you stronger as well.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: If you brought that strength with you today...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You may be the only one who can intrude upon
my scenery.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I won't let you get in the way of my perfect
view.
